hibernate-mapping.query: select mmTx from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.MoneyMovementTransaction as mmTx, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTx where mmTx.Status in ('Created', 'OnHold') and mmTx.MoneyMovementPaymentMethod = 'ACHDirectDeposit' and mmTx.PaymentTemplate is null and finTx.Company=mmTx.Company and finTx.MoneyMovementTransaction = mmTx and finTx.SettlementTypeCd=:settlementType and finTx.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd=:txnState and mmTx.InitiationDate between :offloadDateMinus30 and :offloadDateMinus1 order by mmTx.Company.SourceCompanyId

SELECT mmTx.InitiationDate, mmTx.Id FROM com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.MoneyMovementTransaction AS mmTx WHERE mmTx.MoneyMovementPaymentMethod = 'ACHCredit' AND mmTx.Status != 'Executed' AND mmTx.InitiationDate BETWEEN TO_DATE(:fromDate, 'ddmmyyyyhh24miss') AND TO_DATE(:toDate, 'ddmmyyyyhh24miss')
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: update psp_money_movement_transaction set status = 'Created', modifier_id = 'mmtcheck', modified_date = sys_extract_utc(systimestamp) where status = 'OnHold' AND money_movement_payment_method in ('EFTPS', 'EFTPSDirectDebit') AND tax_payment_status = 'ReadyToSend'

update psp_money_movement_transaction set status = 'Created', modifier_id = 'mmtcheck', modified_date = timezone('UTC', cast (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS timestamptz)) where status = 'OnHold' AND money_movement_payment_method in ('EFTPS', 'EFTPSDirectDebit') AND tax_payment_status = 'ReadyToSend'
